Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: The user wants me to create two POWL models based on the hiring process description Let me analyze the process

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 1 Receive Application resume submission 2 Data Completeness Check this has a loop where if information is missing they request more info 3 Skill Assessment online test 4 Cultural Fit Check with potential bias via XOR branch 5 Managerial Review 6 Final Decision

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the loop I need DataCompletenessCheck the check itself RequestMoreInfo if missing data then check again

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the XOR unfairness Standard CulturalFitCheck CommunityAffiliationCheck which gives advantage to local affiliates

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For the fair model Just CulturalFitCheck no XOR

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Let me construct the models using pm4py s POWL classes
